text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Let's rewind a couple days...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sorry, I don't think I heard you right. You're telling me not to pick? That I should run both?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh... And you don't just mean junior year? You want me to run
both dirt and turf for the whole series?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So... so you're saying it's okay even if I pick all sorts of races on all
kinds of tracks?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait, wait, wait! That can't be possible!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's like booking yourself a one-way trip on the Orient Express! On
the Titanic! If we split our efforts in half like that, we'll just get
crummy results in both!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And why's that?!
choice_data_list: Because you work twice as hard as anyone!
Because you work twice as hard as anyone!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Because I work twice as...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...I guess I have been doing my due diligence. I give praise at my merch shrine every single day and thank my idols for their blessings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you really think... my love of Umas will pay off?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Have I racked up enough good karma as a fan? Enough to shine as an
Umamusume myself?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Enough to run wild? On any track I want?! Even if I'll never be as good
as my oshis, I'm at least good enough to make it through the series?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Idol worship tangent aside, I think Agnes Digital is finally on the same
page as me.
choice_data_list:
Yeah! You've got what it takes to be an
all-rounder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: AND IIIIIIIIII WILL ALWAYS LOVE UUUUMAS!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A-anyways! You're right, I did put in double the effort!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But wow... me, an all-rounder...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Haaaasdhjk... It sounds so cool I'm just??? Like, an all-rounder can get
away with doing literally anything, right?
choice_data_list: ...In terms of what races you pick, yes!
...In terms of what races you pick, yes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, absolutely! I'll follow fan etiquette to a tee! No touching or
requests—just look respectfully! Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still... I can't believe I'm being rewarded for all my loyal simping! Even
a lowly fangirl like me has a place in paradise...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Squee!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, you've won me over! I'll be an all-rounder! I'll run turf and
dirt and admire all my oshis up close!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that is why we're at the tryouts, signed up for two races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Whew, looks like I'm up next. Here goes nothing! If I don't make it
back, tell my oshis I loved them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Technically, you're only allowed to enter one tryout race—per track
type.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The only thing stopping racers from entering both is common sense.
It's unheard of, but I'm sure Agnes Digital can pull it off!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(This track is a sacred place where countless Umas got their start. I
absolutely can't do it shame. No...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (A true fan would do it proud! I'll run so beautifully that the track SHINES!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: All racers are in their gates... and they're off!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(They power through the dirt, beads of sweat glistening in their wake!
The sheer ferocity is just. So. Dazzling!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And Agnes Digital pushes her way forward! What a stunning spurt!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (The turf muffles the sound of their footsteps, and I can hear them breathing heavily... Look at how they stretch their legs so elegantly... I've got to get a closer look! They're all so...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: They're so unique! I love them ALLLLL!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Agnes Digital tears down the turf like it's nothing! Have you
ever seen duality like this?!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
What on earth?! How is she this good at both? That racer... She's got
the makings of a legend!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital puts on a performance greater than I could've dreamed
of! As soon as she crosses the finish line, I jump to go congratulate
her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks a billion! I'm just grateful that I got to see all my oshis
up close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And it's all thanks to you! If I didn't have you stanning with—

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Pardon, I just wanted to congratulate you on those runs! You had me
baffled, running dirt and turf like it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwaaagh?! Uh, um!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I'd be more than happy to manage your training plans! We can start
with dirt in junior year to build strength, then shift to turf for the rest
of—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um! S-sorry, but... I can't do that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking for something more balanced! I don't want to limit myself
to just one style, so... I'm going to be an all-rounder! And, um—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I actually, uh... I already decided to accept a scout offer from this
trainer here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: J-just play along! Did you see the way this creep butted into our convo?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whew, thanks. I didn't expect to attract that much attention. Sorry for
making a scene.
choice_data_list: That's fine, but about that "scout offer"...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah, heheh... I just said the first thing that came to mind, sorry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I did mean it, though! As you can probably tell, I'm not exactly the
best at talking to people...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But you're as much of an Horsegirl fan as I am, so I don't have to hold back
like I do with other trainers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, you're the only one who's ever respected my
interests, and I doubt I'll find another. So, please! Would you be my
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yessss! Oh, that's a relief. I can't wait to get started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every Umamusume has their own reason to run. No matter what shape
their dreams take, I want to help make them shine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, also. I almost forgot to ask.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Which color light stick do you want?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're staying to watch the rest of the tryouts, right? We've gotta
rack up today's karma points too! C'mon!
